name: ASP.NET Misconfiguration: Password in Configuration File
description: An ASP.NET application stores database credentials or passwords in plaintext within configuration files, allowing attackers who gain file access to immediately obtain authentication credentials and compromise protected resources.
detection_pattern: META[web_config] node contains plaintext password or connection string credentials in STORAGE[config_file] without a TRANSFORM[encryption] node (DPAPI, RSA) protecting the sensitive values before storage
